news.headline: World Cup 2026: Algeria beats Jordan 2-1 to clinch its first World Cup win since 2014
news.summary: Algeria stormed back to beat Jordan 2-1 to advance to the 2026 World Cup knockout round in California late Monday thanks to second-half goals from substitute Nadhir Benbouali and Amine Gouiri. It marked the first time Algeria won a World Cup game since 2014.
